intended_use: Vantage Orian 1.5T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of th
intended_use_full: Vantage Orian 1.5T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the head or body. Additionally, this system is capable of non-contrast enhanced imaging, such as MRA.
ground_truth: Comparison to predicate device (commercially available reference filters and previous AiCE version K193097)
other_metrics: Model observer study demonstrated maintained or improved image low contrast detectability; human observer study with 6 board-certified radiologists on 55 studies demonstrated statistical preference for AiCE when compared to other performance filters; SNR and contrast performance testing showed AiCE performed at same level or above commercially available predicate device
